svg.title: Automated Leave Approval System Architecture
svg.desc: Full system architecture showing NGINX, FastAPI, Rule Engine, AI Layer, Redis Queue, Worker, PostgreSQL, and Notification Service

g.text: Browser / Mobile — polls for status, submits leave requests
Auth · idempotency check · save PENDING · invoke rule engine
Configurable rules from DB — approve / reject / uncertain
Calls AI model → updates DB → triggers notification
